steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you say to start a conversation?
questions.hint: The first word to greet someone.

questions.question_text: How do you feel when someone says 'Hello!' to you?
questions.hint: You smile when you feel this way.

questions.question_text: What do you say at the end of a conversation?

steps.question_text: Match the emoji to the word: 👋

steps.title: First Day Greeting
steps.text: He says, 'Hello!' She says, 'Hi!' They listen and answer the teacher.

steps.audio_text: He says, 'Hi! What's your name?' She answers, 'I'm Lily.' They all listen and smile.

steps.prompt: Say: I listen to the teacher.

questions.question_text: Who is she? (Grammar question)
Which word means to say 'hi'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Listening is not important in greetings.
She says, 'Hi!' What is she doing? (Reading comprehension)
He ___ 'hello' to me. (Fill in the blank question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who are saying hello to Ben and Kim?
questions.hint: Look at the friends waving in the video!

questions.question_text: Where are Ben and Kim saying hello?
questions.hint: Where do students usually meet new friends?

questions.question_text: What are Ben and Kim holding?
questions.hint: Think about what you need for school!

items.definition: Used to refer to two or more people
Not old or not known before
Having existed for a long time

steps.question_text: Match the emoji to the word: 👥

steps.title: Ben and Kim
steps.text: Today, Ben and Kim join our class. They are new. Ben is happy. Kim is shy.

steps.explanation: Use he or she for one person; they for two.

steps.audio_text: They are new here. Their names are Ben and Kim. Do you want to say hello?

questions.question_text: ___ is called Ben. (Grammar question)
Which word means 'old'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Ben and Kim are old friends.
Who is your new friend? (Reading comprehension question)
They ___ new here.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What letter do we use to say 'apple'?
questions.hint: Think of the first sound in 'apple'!

questions.question_text: Which letter comes after A in the alphabet?
What letter do we use to say 'cat'?
questions.hint: Listen to the beginning sound of 'cat'!

steps.question_text: Match the emoji to the word: 🔤

steps.title: The Spelling Game
steps.text: In class, they play a spelling game. She spells 'dog'. He spells 'cat'. They clap for the winner!

steps.rule_pattern: ___ is playing the game. Who is ___?

steps.audio_text: She says, 'I can spell the word cat.' He smiles and says, 'Let’s spell the alphabet.'

questions.question: What does he want to spell?

questions.question_text: What does the word 'alphabet' mean? (Vocabulary question)
questions.correct_answer: All the letters from A to Z
options: All the letters from A to Z

questions.question_text: ___ is playing the game. Who is ___? (Grammar question)
True or False: A 'letter' is a part of the alphabet.
How many letters are in the word 'word'? (Reading comprehension)
Fill in the blank: She spells the ___ of her name. (Vocabulary question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you say when you meet someone new?
questions.hint: It's the first word you say when you make a new friend.

questions.question_text: Which word means to greet in the morning?
questions.hint: You say this when you wake up and see someone.

questions.question_text: What do you say when you leave somewhere?
questions.hint: It's what you say when you wave your hand to go.

steps.title: New Friends
steps.text: They are new. Hello! My name is Tim. Who is she? She is Ana. Let's listen and answer.

steps.audio_text: Hi there! My name is Max. This is Sara. She is new here. Let's sing the ABC song together!

questions.question: What do they want to do?

steps.prompt: Say a sentence using words from this unit
steps.expected_text: Hello, my name is Ana and I can spell my name.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
Who is new? (Reading comprehension)
Name the first letter of the alphabet. (Vocabulary question)
